name: Payday Loans Cash
description_short: Jacksonville, FL's Payday Loans Cash at 4737 San Juan Ave offers quick cash loans and advances for residents needing emergency funds.
description_long:
Located at 4737 San Juan Ave in Jacksonville, FL, Payday Loans Cash serves residents seeking quick cash advances and title loans. This standalone storefront operates with extended hours designed for convenience, open daily from 3AM to 2AM to serve customers at various times of day. The location is easily accessible and designed for fast service to Jacksonville's working population.

At this Jacksonville location, Payday Loans Cash offers payday loans and title-based lending for customers who need emergency cash. While a phone number is not listed, customers can visit in person at 4737 San Juan Ave to apply for loans, discuss their needs, and complete transactions. The staff is available throughout the extended daily hours to assist with applications and answer questions about loan options.

Residents of Jacksonville looking for fast cash solutions often turn to this location for urgent financial needs. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and banking information when visiting to expedite the application process. Payday Loans Cash focuses on providing quick turnaround times for those in immediate need of funds.
pros: Claims network of 100+ lending partners, potentially increasing approval odds
Online application takes only a few minutes with no required office visits
Single application form submitted to multiple lenders rather than individual submissions
Uses 256-bit SSL encryption for data security during online submission
Advertises next-business-day funding for approved loans
Services available specifically for Phoenix, Arizona residents
No upfront fees mentioned for the application/matching service
cons: Website content is poorly written, repetitive, and confusing with unclear messaging throughout
No APRs or fee schedules disclosed on the website—only revealed after submission to lender
No details about loan amounts available, approval requirements, or income minimums
Broken About Us page (404 error) prevents access to company background or credibility information
Acts as intermediary rather than direct lender, meaning actual loan terms set by partner lenders, not this company
No information about whether this is a legitimate marketplace or potential lead-generation service
best_for: Phoenix, Arizona residents needing $100–$1,000 in emergency cash within 1–2 business days
Borrowers comfortable with online-only applications and direct bank deposit funding
Consumers seeking payday loans who want to avoid visiting multiple lender websites individually
diagnosis: Payday Loans Cash is best suited for Phoenix-area residents who need emergency cash ($100–$1,000) urgently and prefer completing a single online application. Critical caveat: This is a lending marketplace, not a direct lender—actual loan terms, APRs, and fees are determined by partner lenders and only disclosed after you submit personal information and are redirected to a lender's website. The poor website quality and lack of transparency about loan details suggest thorough review of partner lender terms before accepting any offer.
services: Direct bank account deposit of loan proceeds
Encrypted online form submission to lenders
meta_description: Payday Loans Cash at 4737 San Juan Ave, Jacksonville, FL. Fast cash advances for emergency financial needs.
